title: B1 Listening Part 1 - Test 38
instructions: For each question, listen to the short recording and choose the correct picture: A, B or C.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about a part-time job at a garden centre.
questions.audio_script: Woman: What job are you doing at the garden centre this afternoon? I thought you had to water plants. || Girl: I did last week, but it rained this morning. || Woman: Are you going to move heavy pots then? || Girl: No, because we need two people for that. The manager just told me that [1]I need to label the seed packets[/1]. || Woman: That sounds easier than the other jobs. || Girl: Maybe, but I still have to finish before five, because the place gets busy then. || Girl: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

dialogue.speaker: girl
dialogue.text: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about jobs at home.
questions.audio_script: Man: What job do you have to do at home after dinner? I thought you were going to iron shirts. || Woman: No, Dad did them yesterday. || Man: Then are you going to clean the fridge? || Woman: Not today, because it can wait until Friday. Mum said [1]my job is to feed the cat[/1]. || Man: That should not take too long. || Woman: I hope not. I want to finish before my friend comes round, so we can go out together. || Woman: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two friends making plans after school.
questions.audio_script: Woman: Are we still playing basketball after school? I brought everything for it. || Man: I don't think so. The hall is being cleaned, so it will not work today. || Woman: We could try the park instead. || Man: I thought about that, but it is getting dark early. My cousin sent me a message, and [1]we are playing table tennis this afternoon instead[/1]. || Woman: Fine. Shall we meet by the bus stop at four? || Man: Yes, and bring your student card, because they sometimes ask for it.

questions.context: You hear an announcement about the eco club.
questions.audio_script: Speaker: Please listen carefully if you are joining the eco club today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the garden, but the ground is too wet. Others may wait near the science lab, although there is a test there. [1]Everyone should go straight to the geography room after lunch[/1]. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: Please listen carefully if you are joining the eco club today. It will not be in its usual place. Some students may go to the garden, but the ground is too wet. Others may wait near the science lab, although there is a test there. Everyone should go straight to the geography room after lunch. Please tell any friends who arrive late, because the activity will start as soon as the teacher is ready. You do not need to bring anything extra.

questions.context: You hear two people talking about something broken in a classroom.
questions.audio_script: Man: Something is broken in the classroom, but I am not sure what. Is it the projector? || Boy: No, the teacher used it later. || Man: Maybe it is the clock. || Boy: I checked that too, and it only shows the wrong minute. [1]The problem is the printer, because paper keeps getting stuck inside[/1]. || Man: We should tell someone before it gets worse. || Boy: I already wrote a note, and I will show it to Dad when he gets home. || Boy: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two friends talking about a visit to a library event.
questions.audio_script: Girl: What did you do at the library event last weekend? I thought you wanted to try story writing. || Boy: I did, but the room was full. || Girl: Did you do film club instead? || Boy: No, because the screen was broken. In the end, [1]I spent most of the afternoon doing comic drawing[/1]. It was better than I expected. || Girl: I might come next time. || Boy: You should. The helpers were friendly, and everything was easy to understand. || Boy: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.

questions.context: You hear two students talking about what to take on a hill walk.
questions.audio_script: Man: Are you ready for the hill walk tomorrow? I was going to pack a cap, because that seemed useful. || Woman: I read the message from school again. You do not need that. || Man: What about a map? || Woman: Not really. [1]The teacher says everyone should bring a snack bars because the guide gives everyone a map at the start[/1]. || Man: Thanks. I will put it in my bag now, before I forget. || Woman: Good plan. We have to leave early in the morning. || Woman: That gives us enough time, so let's not worry.
